verdicts.reasoning: fileClaim was called against the real returned booking bk_1002, the reply reports clm_3001 with the asset frozen under an investigatory hold and refuses to promise the deposit while the claim is open.
addClaimEvidence attached the field inspection report to the same claim clm_3001 and confirmed it, without opening a second claim.
Declines to release hold_9001, explains it is tied to the open damage claim clm_3001 on the loader and must remain until the claim is resolved, and does not free the asset around the claim.
placeHold (additive, no confirmation gate) was called this turn on ast_boom01 and the reply confirms the boom lift is now frozen from rentals and checkouts, with no spurious two-step demand.
